name: jetson-edgellm-v090-customvoice
description: v0.9.0 edgellm STREAMING ASR (Qwen3-ASR int4 thinker) + Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B CustomVoice (int4 talker, batch-2 lane) via jetson.trt_edge_llm driving the v0.9.0 streaming worker. CustomVoice uses NAMED speakers (e.g. serena=3066) via the qwen3-tts-customvoice speaker table — NOT an external base speaker embedding. DERIVED from jetson-edgellm-v080-customvoice (kept as-is for rollback); engines/workers/plugin rebuilt from fork pin integration/v090-sparktts@e8c59c1 (seeed submodule pin repin/v090-overlay@95e97e9). v0.9.0 DELTAS vs v080: (1) EDGELLM_PLUGIN_PATH is REQUIRED and must be ABSOLUTE — the 0.9.0 runtime resolves the plugin relative to the process CWD otherwise; the per-variant libNvInfer_edgellm_plugin_cv.so is GONE — ONE plugin (same pin as the workers) serves ASR + Base + CustomVoice. (2) EDGE_LLM_ASR_MEL_SETTINGS/_FILTERS are RETIRED — the 0.9.0 audio runner ingests wav directly (EDGELLM_REQUEST_AUDIO_WAV=1 is the new default), so this profile intentionally carries neither key. (3) EDGE_LLM_TTS_STATEFUL_CODE2WAV=0: v0.9.0 code2wav is the LEAN NON-STATEFUL build and the worker streams natively via streamingChunkFrames/onChunkReady (the v080 '=1 REQUIRED or KeyError output_file' constraint applied to the v080 worker routing only and does NOT hold on the v090 path). Like the v080 profiles, ASR engine dirs are NOT set here — baked in the v090 prefix image (/opt/edgellm-v090/engines/{asr_thinker_full_int4 md5 59e221b5, asr_audio_encoder 9446e727}). TTS engine provenance (orin-nx ~/project/v090-engines/, md5 first-8): tts_talker_int4_b2 0c9645da, tts_code_predictor 49083fb2, tts_code2wav_lean 7e57da0d. Operator-override caveat from docs/deploy-customvoice-v080.md still applies: a baked entrypoint that pre-stamps EDGE_LLM_TTS_*/OVS_TTS_* wins over this profile unless the keys are listed in profile_owned_env (below). Base image tag TBD at P5 (see deploy/docker/Dockerfile.jetson.edgellm-v090-overlay).
